name: Support billing address policy example
answer:
Customers must verify the account owner before support changes the billing address.
Support changes the billing address after 1 hour of identity verification.
Customers receive a free password manager after a billing address change.

sources.title: Support Billing Address Policy
sources.content:
Customers must verify the account owner before support changes the billing address.
Support changes the billing address only after 24 hours of identity verification.
